title: Example Agent Profile
description: Example agent configuration demonstrating all available options including model overrides.
context: This is an example agent profile. Copy this folder to create your own custom agent profiles.
_comment: Model overrides allow this role to use different models than the defaults. Remove or set to null to use global settings.

chat_model._comment: Override the main chat model for this role

utility_model._comment: Override the utility model for this role (used for memory, summarization, etc.)

embeddings_model._comment: Override the embeddings model for this role

browser_model._comment: Override the browser model for this role (used for web browsing)
